recent_episodes.title: The Hidden Costs of Cheap SEO: Why Your Social Business Can't Afford to Cut Search Corners with Favour Obasi-ike
recent_episodes.description:
In this eye-opening episode of the We Don't PLAY! Podcast, host Favour Obasi-ike, MBA, MS dismantles the myth of "cheap SEO." Joined by guests Dr. Fashion, Austin, John, and Celese, the conversation exposes the significant long-term damage that corner-cutting SEO practices can inflict on a business.

Favour emphasizes that SEO is not a one-time fix but a long-term investment in your brand's digital foundation. The episode draws a powerful analogy, comparing cheap SEO to building a house

recent_episodes.title: Google Discover Core Update (February 2026): Web, App and Local SEO Insights with Favour Obasi-ike
recent_episodes.description:
For the first time, Google has publicly designated a core update as a "Discover Core Update," signaling a major shift in how content is surfaced to users. In this podcast episode of the We Don't PLAY!™️ Podcast, host Favour Obasi-ike, MBA, MS, unpacks the groundbreaking February 2026 Google Core Update with 200+ people in the Clubhouse Audio LIVE! room.

recent_episodes.title: Bri Toria: THEMELANINUNIVERSE.COM x Eye Am Isis Tour x From Negativity to Motivation Empowerment Story
recent_episodes.description:
Welcome to the stage: Bri is here to discuss her multifaceted journey in the music industry. From her beginnings behind the scenes to stepping into the spotlight as a vocalist, Bri shares the inspiration behind her brand, "Melanin Universe," a platform for networking and promoting fellow artists.

She delves into her creative process, the spiritual and Egyptian influences on her music and merchandise, and the story behind her debut song, "Goddess Love."
